name: DO-178C (Aviation)
description: RTCA DO-178C — Software Considerations in Airborne Systems and Equipment Certification.

system-requirement.label: System Requirement
system-requirement.note: DO-178C §5.1 — derived from system-level safety assessment

sw-requirement.label: High-Level Requirement
sw-requirement.note: DO-178C §6.3.1 — developed from system requirements allocated to software

detailed-design.label: Low-Level Requirement
detailed-design.note: DO-178C §6.3.3 — source code can be directly implemented from LLRs

sw-verification.label: SW Verification
sw-verification.note: DO-178C §6.4 — verifies HLRs against test results

assurance-level.label: Design Assurance Level
assurance-level.note: Levels A (catastrophic) through E (no effect) per DO-178C §2.3

development-plan.label: Plan for Software Aspects of Certification
